'''鈭歬-y-y''' ('''kakayay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadriplicate|quadriplicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadriplicate|quadriplicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-y-y
|-
! Lemma
| kakayay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikayay|thikayay]] || [[word:jikayay|jikayay]] || [[word:shikayay|shikayay]] || [[word:kikayay|kikayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukayay|thuthukayay]] || [[word:jujukayay|jujukayay]] || [[word:shushukayay|shushukayay]] || [[word:kukukayay|kukukayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukayay|thukayay]] || [[word:jukayay|jukayay]] || [[word:shukayay|shukayay]] || [[word:kukayay|kukayay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukayay|thukayay]] || [[word:jukayay|jukayay]] || [[word:shukayay|shukayay]] || [[word:kukayay|kukayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekayay|thekayay]] || [[word:jekayay|jekayay]] || [[word:shekayay|shekayay]] || [[word:kekayay|kekayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokayay|thothokayay]] || [[word:jojokayay|jojokayay]] || [[word:shoshokayay|shoshokayay]] || [[word:kokokayay|kokokayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokayay|thokayay]] || [[word:jokayay|jokayay]] || [[word:shokayay|shokayay]] || [[word:kokayay|kokayay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokayay|thokayay]] || [[word:jokayay|jokayay]] || [[word:shokayay|shokayay]] || [[word:kokayay|kokayay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]] || [[word:kayay|kayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kayay|th忙kayay]] || [[word:j忙kayay|j忙kayay]] || [[word:sh忙kayay|sh忙kayay]] || [[word:k忙kayay|k忙kayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakayay|thathakayay]] || [[word:jajakayay|jajakayay]] || [[word:shashakayay|shashakayay]] || [[word:kakakayay|kakakayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakayay|thakayay]] || [[word:jakayay|jakayay]] || [[word:shakayay|shakayay]] || [[word:kakayay|kakayay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakayay|thakayay]] || [[word:jakayay|jakayay]] || [[word:shakayay|shakayay]] || [[word:kakayay|kakayay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakayay|shakayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakayay|goshakayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakayay|gokishakayay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakayayn眉|shakayayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakayaynkn眉|goshakayaynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayayn眉|gokishakayayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakayaysh毛|shakayaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakayaynksh毛|goshakayaynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakayaysh毛|gokishakayaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayayro|shakayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayaynkro|goshakayaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayayro|gokishakayayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayaymu|shakayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayaynkmu|goshakayaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayaymu|gokishakayaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakayaysher|shakayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakayaynksher|goshakayaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakayaysher|gokishakayaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakayayng|shakayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakayaynkng|goshakayaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakayayng|gokishakayayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakayayya|shakayayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakayaynkya|goshakayaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakayayya|gokishakayayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakayayyam|shakayayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakayaynkyam|goshakayaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakayayyam|gokishakayayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayayn眉sh毛|shakayayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayaynkn眉sh毛|goshakayaynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayayn眉sh毛|gokishakayayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayayn眉ro|shakayayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayaynkn眉ro|goshakayaynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayayn眉ro|gokishakayayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayayn眉mu|shakayayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayaynkn眉mu|goshakayaynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayayn眉mu|gokishakayayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayaysh毛n眉|shakayaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayaynksh毛n眉|goshakayaynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayaysh毛n眉|gokishakayaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayaysh毛ro|shakayaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayaynksh毛ro|goshakayaynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayaysh毛ro|gokishakayaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayaysh毛mu|shakayaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayaynksh毛mu|goshakayaynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayaysh毛mu|gokishakayaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayayron眉|shakayayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayaynkron眉|goshakayaynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayayron眉|gokishakayayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayayrosh毛|shakayayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayaynkrosh毛|goshakayaynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayayrosh毛|gokishakayayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayayromu|shakayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayaynkromu|goshakayaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayayromu|gokishakayayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayaymun眉|shakayaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayaynkmun眉|goshakayaynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayaymun眉|gokishakayaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayaymush毛|shakayaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayaynkmush毛|goshakayaynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayaymush毛|gokishakayaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayaymuro|shakayaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayaynkmuro|goshakayaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayaymuro|gokishakayaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
